name: Landing Page Structure
description: Design a high-conversion landing page structure: section flow, content blocks, CTA placement, social proof strategy, and responsive layout guidance.

inputs.name: product
inputs.description: Product or service the landing page is for

inputs.name: goal
inputs.description: Primary conversion goal (signup, purchase, demo, waitlist)

outputs.name: page_structure
outputs.description: Ordered list of page sections with purpose and content guidance

outputs.name: hero_section
outputs.description: Hero section design: headline, subheadline, CTA, visual guidance

outputs.name: social_proof_strategy
outputs.description: Where and how to use social proof throughout the page

outputs.name: cta_strategy
outputs.description: CTA placement, types, and progression through the page

outputs.name: objection_flow
outputs.description: How the page addresses objections in sequence

quality_checks.name: conversion_logic
quality_checks.description: Page follows attention → interest → desire → action flow
